node.text: Tap a bar, then choose a chord

A compact performance kit that uses the same synthetic Pocket Chordsmith drum bus. Kick, snare, hat and open hat can write into the current rhythm grid while playback is running. Clap maps to a snare accent. Toms, crash and ride are live-only colour.

node.hint: Keyboard: arrows move; Space/Enter cycles; T toggles a triplet with the next cell. On manual bass, H holds into the next empty cell, S connects to a different next note, A toggles accent, and Delete clears.

node.text: Beat cells cycle Off -> Hit -> Accent. Full/Half/Quarter/Eighth/Sixteenth are straight grid resolutions. Triplets are now marked as tuplets: place two adjacent hits, then drag right-to-left across them to mark a small 3. The two cells then play three evenly spaced hits in the time of two cells. Triplets cannot overlap; consecutive triplets use pairs like 1-2, 3-4, 5-6.
arrows move; Space/Enter cycles; T toggles a triplet with the next cell. On manual bass, H holds into the next empty cell, S connects to a different next note, A toggles accent, and Delete clears.
Apply Guitar Pattern to All Sections

node.hint: Keyboard: Space/Enter cycles articulation; 1 through 5 choose open, chug, accent, hold, or scratch; Delete clears.

node.text: Space/Enter cycles articulation; 1 through 5 choose open, chug, accent, hold, or scratch; Delete clears.
Cells cycle Rest, strum, palm mute, accent, hold and scratch. Guitar follows each bar's chord as root, fifth and octave power chords.

node.hint: Drag to play the selected melody track, or use Left and Right Arrow for pitch and Up and Down Arrow for the Y value. Hold Shift for finer Y changes. Home and End select the first and last pitch. Escape stops the pad. In Sustain mode, Y controls sustain or frequency. In Pulse mode, Y can control pulse rate in time with the music.

node.text: Drag to play the selected melody track, or use Left and Right Arrow for pitch and Up and Down Arrow for the Y value. Hold Shift for finer Y changes. Home and End select the first and last pitch. Escape stops the pad. In Sustain mode, Y controls sustain or frequency. In Pulse mode, Y can control pulse rate in time with the music.

node.text: Space/Enter places or cycles a note; T toggles a triplet with the next note; H holds into the next empty cell; S connects to a different next note; Delete clears.
Build up to eight sections, set each section length, then arrange them into a song sequence.
Tap a slot to cycle A-H. Long press clears it. Use + Slot to extend the song. Export can render the full song sequence.

node.content-desc: Your connection to this site is not secure

node.hint: Search Google or type URL
